name: ToyDigitalProductPassport
description: Digital Product Passport for toys as required by Article 20 and Annex VI of the EU Toy Safety Regulation. Contains all 14 mandatory fields from Annex VI Part I.

leaf_properties.label: Unique Product Identifier
leaf_properties.description: Unique product identifier linked to the data carrier on the toy. Annex VI Part I (a).

leaf_properties.label: Toy Model Name
leaf_properties.description: Commercial name identifying the specific toy model. Annex VI Part I (e).

leaf_properties.label: Toy Model Description
leaf_properties.description: Description enabling traceability of the toy model. Annex VI Part I (e).

leaf_properties.label: Product Image URL
leaf_properties.description: Colour image of sufficient clarity to identify the toy. Annex VI Part I (e).

leaf_properties.label: Commodity Code
leaf_properties.description: Commodity code under Regulation (EEC) No 2658/87. Annex VI Part I (f). Optional if not applicable.

leaf_properties.label: Manufacturer Responsibility Statement
leaf_properties.description: Statement that the DPP is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer. Annex VI Part I (d).

leaf_properties.label: Union Law Reference
leaf_properties.description: Reference to Union law the toy complies with. Annex VI Part I (g). Repeat for each regulation/directive.

leaf_properties.label: Harmonised Standard Reference
leaf_properties.description: Reference to harmonised standards or common specifications used. Annex VI Part I (i).

leaf_properties.label: Declaration of Conformity Replacement
leaf_properties.description: Mention that this DPP replaces an EU Declaration of Conformity. Annex VI Part I (h). Omit if not applicable.

leaf_properties.label: CE Marking Present
leaf_properties.description: Confirmation that CE marking is affixed to the toy. Annex VI Part I (k).

leaf_properties.label: Allergenic Fragrance
leaf_properties.description: Allergenic fragrance subject to labelling (Annex II Appendix Part B.1). Annex VI Part I (l). Omit if none present above threshold.

leaf_properties.label: Distributor Communication Channel
leaf_properties.description: Channel for distributors to obtain the data carrier copy. Article 7(12) / Annex VI Part I (m).

leaf_properties.label: DPP Service Provider Reference
leaf_properties.description: Reference to the DPP service provider hosting the back-up copy. Annex VI Part I (n).

leaf_properties.label: Safety Gate Portal Link
leaf_properties.description: Link to Safety Gate Portal for reporting unsafe toys. Article 20(11).

leaf_properties.label: Safety Information and Warnings
leaf_properties.description: Safety information and warnings. Annex VI Part II (a). Optional.

leaf_properties.label: Instructions of Use
leaf_properties.description: Instructions of use. Annex VI Part II (b). Optional.

metadata.note: Fields (b)(c) reference EconomicOperator brick; field (j) references NotifiedBody brick.
